characters.name: A Horse of a Different Color
characters.description: A Horse of a Different Color KrysandOn-Xvisit and they participate in a horse race. Starlite meets a new horse calledSunriserand starts to feel jealous. Early one morning inRainbow Land, a lovelymagenta colored horseover looks the morning sunrise.

characters.name: Baby Brite
characters.description: Baby BriteProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 1""The Queen of the Sprites"Voice ActorPat FraleyInformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidAge6 monthsEye ColorBlueHair ColorPinkRelativesMr. Brite (Father)Mrs. Brite (Mother)Rainbow Brite(Sister)Krys(cousin)Brian(cousin many times removed)Unnamed cousin and cousin-in-law many times removedStatusAliveoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorRainbow Baby Britewas the civilian identity of theSphere of Light. In the TV episode "The Beginning of Rainbow Land," the character known as "The Baby" is introduced as a mysterious figure. Later on, it is revealed that this character is actually the Sphere of Light, also referred to by fans as Lady Brite. This revelation occurs when the Sphere of Light assists Wisp in navigating through the dark world. Additionally, the booklet accompanying the Baby Brite doll provides a different account of her origins in Rainbow Land, noting her resemblance to Rainbow Brite with a star on her cheek.

characters.name: Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 1
characters.description: Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 1 Beginning of Rainbowlandis an episode from theRainbow Britetelevision series. It is a two-part episode, with this page discussing its first half. Here, the backstory ofRainbow Landand origins ofRainbow Briteare revealed. At one time,Rainbow Landwas a dark and desolate place, devoid of color, light and happiness. Fearsome animals roamed the land, and the only residents who held any hope were theSprites.

characters.name: Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 2
characters.description: Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 2 Beginning of Rainbowlandis the first episode of theRainbow Britetelevision series. It is a two-part episode, with this page discussing its second half (The first half is covered inBeginning of Rainbowland - Part 1. Here, even with theColor Beltin her possession, the fight to bring color to the world isn't over.Wispwill need the help of theColor kids. The keepers of theStar Sprinklesthat will make the world full of color again. The episode would be followed byPeril in the Pits.

characters.name: Bombo
characters.description: BomboProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""The Queen of the Sprites"Voice ActorLes TremayneInformationGenderMaleSpeciesSpriteHair ColorWhiteStatusAliveoccupationHeroFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorWhite Bombois a polisher classSpritefrom the planetSpectra. Bombo's main job was to keep Spectra's diamond surface scratch and dust free. That way, more light could pass through it. One day, theDark Princesstried to tie up Spectra in a vast net so that she could pull it back to her homeworld. Bombo was witness toRainbow BriteandKryssuccessful efforts at stopping the princess.

characters.name: Brian
characters.description: Brian19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorScott MenvilleMarcus Toji (reboot)InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge11Eye ColorBrownHair ColorBrownRelativesUnnamed parentsMr. Brite (many greats uncle)Mrs. Brite (many greats aunt)Rainbow Brite(cousin many times removed)Krys(ancestor)Baby Bright(cousin many times removed)StatusAliveoccupationStudentHeroFriendColor KidsSpritesAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorBlue Brianis an 11-year-old year old boy from planetEarth. Brian metRainbow Briteby accident, one day, when he walked straight through one of her rainbows. After the accident, Rainbow took Brian with her back toRainbow Land, in order to remove the unwanted colors. Ever since then, Brian has returned to Rainbow Land on occasion...and has participated in some of Rainbow's missions. (He once saved her and Starlite from a pool of quicksand.) Rainbow Brite also gave Brian akeywhich, when placed in any lock, opens for him a doorway to Rainbow Land. Brian is the only person on Earth that can see Rainbow.

characters.name: Buddy Blue
characters.description: Buddy Blue19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorPat FraleyEvan Cooper (reboot)InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHummanoidEye ColorBlueHair ColorBlueStatusAliveoccupationHeroFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorBlueBuddy Blueis one of theColor kids, he represents the color blue. His sprite isChamp. Buddy lives and breathes physical fitness and excels in everything sports related. He is always trying to organize the other kids into sports activities. Buddy is also into healthy foods, and often lectures on the virtues of such a diet. Buddy is also a peace-loving boy who works hard to ensure calm among the Color Kids andSprites. Since the blue Sprites are the ones who help him color the skies and the oceans and all the other blue things that make up Rainbow Land.

characters.name: Canary Yellow
characters.description: Canary Yellow19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorMona MarshallAlexandra Krosney (reboot)InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorYellowBlue (reboot)Hair ColorYellowStatusAliveoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorYellow Canary Yellowis one of theColor kids, she represents the color yellow, her sprite isSpark. Canary is the optimist of the group and is filled with a wish to cheer everyone up and make them smile. Like many optimists, Canary is somewhat naïve. Canary isRainbow Brite's best friend among theColor kidscausing yellow, the color of cheerfulness, is Rainbow's favorite. Canary supervises the work of the yellowSpritesand introduces the yellow wishes of the world.

characters.name: Champ
characters.description:
Champis a blueSprite, and as such is a close acquaintance ofBuddy Blue. Champ is the Sprite in charge of all the blueColor Crystals. Champ enjoys 
mining in the Color Caves because it helps him build muscle. Buddy taught also him the value of being physically fit.

characters.name: Chasing Rainbows
characters.description: Chasing Rainbowsis an episode of the 1980's cartoon series. Here,Murky Dismalcreates a robot impostor ofRainbow Briteto besmirch her relationship with her friends. Chasing Rainbows Murky Dismalis battling a case of insomnia.Lurky's snoring is so loud that he can't sleep. He orders Lurky to be quite, but when Lurky yells back he's knocked into a bookcase. Books come crashing down on his head, and the one that lands in front of his face turns out to be very interesting. It says that the best way to deceive someone, is with the person they trust the most. So Murky gets the bright idea of making a roboticRainbow Briteto fool theColor kids. He stays up all night working on her, then determines that he needs Star Sprinkles to finish her, so he and Lurky head to Rainbow Land to get some.

characters.name: Cloudy With a Chance of Gloom
characters.description: Cloudy With a Chance of Gloom Cloudy With a Chance of Gloomis the first episode of the 2014 reboot of theRainbow Britefranchise. The episode is succeeded byThe Ring's the Thing. Rainbow Britefinds an awesome new friend inBrian, a normal boy from Earth. But when a dark power has plans for Brian, Rainbow must find his purpose to saveRainbow Land.[1]

characters.name: Color kids
characters.description: See also:The Color Kids A list of all the Color Kids, and what color they represent/protect. As seen in the original animated series.

characters.name: Count Blogg
characters.description: Count Blogg Count Bloggis the royal advisor to theDark Princess. Blogg is the loyal servant of the Dark Princess, and sees it as his duty to keep the Princess happy. He will do all that she asks and does his best to find her more diamonds to add to her collection. After his mistresses defeat at the hands ofRainbow BriteandKrys, he accompanied her to Rainbow Land, where he helped her into coercing theSpritesinto looking for diamonds for her by turning them into frogs.

characters.name: Count Blogg
characters.description: Count Blogg Count Bloggis the royal advisor to theDark Princess. Blogg is the loyal servant of the Dark Princess, and sees it as his duty to keep the Princess happy. He will do all that she asks and does his best to find her more diamonds to add to her collection. After his mistresses defeat at the hands ofRainbow BriteandKrys, he accompanied her to Rainbow Land, where he helped her into coercing theSpritesinto looking for diamonds for her by turning them into frogs.

characters.name: Dark Princess
characters.description: Dark Princess19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorRhonda AldrichMolly Ringwald (reboot)InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorHazelHair ColorRedStatusAliveoccupationVillainFriendMurky DismalLurkyStormy(2014 reboot only)King of Shadows(possibly)Sgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererEnemyColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightStormy(classic series)Skydancer(classic series)WajjaFlockFavorite ColorBlackTheDark Princessis the main antagonist in "Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer" movie. Her only appearance in the original cartoon is in the episodeQueen of the Sprites, but she is also mentioned in the 2009 reboot and became the main villain in the2014 reboot. The Dark Princess loved to collect diamonds and other beautiful, expensive gems. She constantly carried a large emerald which she treated as if it were a pet and even talked to it as if it were alive. The Dark Princess wanted the diamond planetSpectraall to herself. But by attempting to steal it, she caused Earth to become trapped in a permanent winter, and soon the rest of the universe would have been brought into darkness. She was confronted byRainbow BriteandKrys, who worked together to defeat her and strip her of her powers. She is later blown up attempting to get away and seemingly killed, as someone had sabotaged the ship, causing it to explode on her. The Dark Princess later appeared inRainbow Land, which reveals that the explosion didn't kill her, and she still holds a grudge towards Rainbow Brite for taking away her powers. She and her loyal servantCount Blogglanded in a ship at night. It turns out the Princess had come to that world in search of diamonds to restore her powers. She and the Count then encountered someSpriteswhile searching for diamonds in the color caves. She attempted to force the Sprites into digging up the gems for her, first by claiming to be "Queen of the Sprites" and claiming that she had the power to turn them into frogs. Despite this, and later forming an alliance withMurky Dismal, the Princess and Count Blogg were eventually defeated by Rainbow and her Color Belt once more, and the rainbow picked up their ship and sent it far away into exile.

characters.description: Glee is a girlsprite. She is under the care ofTickled Pink. GleeTwilite (2009)19842009

characters.name: Hammy
characters.description: Hammyis an indigoSprite, and as such is a close acquaintance ofIndigo Doll. Hammy is the Sprite in charge of all the indigoColor Crystals. Hammy apparently got his name from his love of acting. While some find him overly dramatic, Indigo appreciates his personality. Hammy is in charge of color crystals thatRainbow Briteuses for things such as blueberries and lakes.

ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorIndigoIndigo Dollis one of theColor kids, she represents the color Indigo, her sprite isHammy.  Indigo is always rehearsing and reciting line from famous plays and making entrances wearing more fancy costumes. Indigo likes to think of herself as an artist with high aspirations. Indigo's color represents drama and emotion. Her responsibility is for the indigoSpritesand for the colors they create.

characters.name: Invasion of Rainbow Land
characters.description: Invasion of Rainbow Land Rainbow and her friends learn they are not the only friendly people in the universe. Rainbow Britehad started her day by reviving a dying forest on Earth, with the help ofTwinkandStarlite. Wajja,Moonglow

characters.name: IQ
characters.description: From RainbowBrite.net IQis a violetSprite, and as such is a close acquaintance ofShy Violet. IQ is the Sprite in charge of all the violetColor Crystals. And like Shy Violet, IQ is also little on the shy side as well.Rainbow Briteoften uses the crystals IQ mines for grapes, plums, and sunsets.

characters.description: King of ShadowsProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 1""Beginning of Rainbowland - Part 2"InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanoid Shadow CreatureStatusDeadPersonalityTyrannicaloccupationKing of ShadowsFriendMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererEnemyColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockFateIs destroyed byRainbow Brite, though his cape remains behind. TheKing of Shadowswas a fierce and mysterious being of darkness. Also called "The Evil One" he was the ruler ofRainbow LandbeforeWisparrived. The King of Shadows is a mysterious shadow creature with purple pentadactyl hands that end in long, sharp fingers. His outfit consists of a dark blue robe that keeps him concealed. The only other part of his body visible is his yellow eyes. The aberration speaks in a creepy voice.

characters.name: Kitty Brite
characters.description: Kitty BriteProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Night""The Queen of the Sprites"InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesCatHair ColorWhite with rainbowStatusAliveoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorRainbow Kitty BriteisRainbow Brite's pet cat. Kitty Brite first appeared in "Rainbow Night" sleeping on a window ledge. Kitty Brite is a fluffy white cat, with multi-colored feet, tail and ears. Kitty is good friends withPuppy Brite, and are often seen playing together. They both sleep in Rainbow Brite's room.

characters.name: Krys
characters.description: KrysProduction InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Queen of the Sprites"Voice ActorDavid MendenhallInformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorBlueHair ColorBrownRelativesMr. Brite (uncle)Mrs. Brite (aunt)Rainbow Brite(cousin)Baby Bright(cousin)Brian(descendant)Unnamed descendant and descendant-in-lawStatusAliveoccupationHeroFriendColor KidsSpritesAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorRainbow Krysis a protagonistic character in theRainbow Britefranchise, making his debut appearance inRainbow Brite and the Star Stealer. He is the protector of the planetSpectraand the wearer of the Prism. Krys is a young warrior from the planet Spectra. He was taught to protect the diamond planet by the wise oldOrin. Krys is head strong, and arrogant, not unlikeRed Butlerof Rainbow Land. When he started out, Krys often insisted he can get by without a girl for help, but at the time he didn't know the Prism, a device given to him by Orin would only work with the rainbow. Krys later realized he andRainbow Britehad to work together to defeat their enemies. Krys is often accompanied by his horse On-X, who has rocket feet that enable him to fly.

characters.name: Lala Orange
characters.description: Lala Orange19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorRobbie LeeMariana Flores (revival)InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorAmberBlue (revival)Hair ColorOrangeStatusAlivePersonalityBubblyoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorOrange Lala Orangeis one of theColor Kids, she represents the color orange, her sprite isOJ. Lala can often be found beautifying before she is convinced she looks "just so". Lala is a bubbly and energetic girl who knows exactly what she wants, and she usually gets it. Though she can be a bit pushy and bossy at times, this means well. Lala is quite playful, especially with her boyfriendRed Butler, on whom she cherishes a crush. Her color of energy and spirit, is to protect herself. She is responsible for the protection of all the orangeSprites.

characters.name: Lala Orange
characters.description: Lala Orange19842014Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Operation Sparkle Color Explosion"Voice ActorRobbie LeeMariana Flores (revival)InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorAmberBlue (revival)Hair ColorOrangeStatusAlivePersonalityBubblyoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorOrange Lala Orangeis one of theColor Kids, she represents the color orange, her sprite isOJ. Lala can often be found beautifying before she is convinced she looks "just so". Lala is a bubbly and energetic girl who knows exactly what she wants, and she usually gets it. Though she can be a bit pushy and bossy at times, this means well. Lala is quite playful, especially with her boyfriendRed Butler, on whom she cherishes a crush. Her color of energy and spirit, is to protect herself. She is responsible for the protection of all the orangeSprites.

characters.name: Lucky
characters.description: Luckyis a greenSprite, and as such is a close acquaintance ofPatty O'Green. Lucky is the Sprite in charge of all the greenColor Crystals. Lucky has also been known to be a "good luck charm" to those around him.

characters.name: Moonglow
characters.description: Moonglow19842009Production InformationFirst episodeLatest episode"Rainbow Brite and the Star Stealer""Trouble in Rainbowland"Voice ActorRhonda AldrichInformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanoidEye ColorBlueViolet (reboot)Hair ColorPastel PinkBlue (reboot)StatusAliveoccupationHeroineFriendColor KidsSpritesBrianKrysAnimalsSphere of LightWajjaFlockEnemyMurky DismalLurkyDark PrincessStormySkydancerMrs. DismalKing of ShadowsSgt. ZomboSorrell the SorcererFavorite ColorMoonglowMoonglowis aColor kid, she represents the moon and is responsible for brightening up the colors of the night. Her sprite isNite sprite. While the otherColor Kidsuse theirColor Crystalsto brighten the colors for a day, Moonglow fixes to make sure the stars and moon shine bright and happy. Moonglow and herSpritefriendNite Spritemake sure the stars to keep their natural shine. Moonglow has Red-pink hair accompanied with a blue hairband and a red ribbon. She wears a blue dress with a white apron, adorned with salmon pink suspender trimmings and a belt, instead of the usual stars the other color kids have she has a moon symbol instead, she also has white socks with two shades of pink trimmings, and light blue maryjane shoes.

characters.name: Mrs. Dismal
characters.description: Mrs. Dismalis the mother ofMurky Dismal(who she affectionately refers to as "Murkwell"). Despite knowing about the trouble Murky causes inRainbow Land. Mrs. Dismal remembers back when he was still a very sweet child. When Murky was young, he used to paint all over the house. But once he painted all over the walls she told him he had to stop. Unfortunately he took her words too far and stopped liking color altogether. She once metRainbow Briteand thought of her as a sweet and kind girl.
